# How to write an ADR

This page is a policy page, not a table of contents — a real shape found running
R5 (edgex-docs points its own README elsewhere for the real index; opendatahub's
README links zero individual decisions, only external reference URLs). It cites
no ADR file in bullet, numbered, or table form. Must NOT be read as "every ADR in
this directory is missing from the index": zero recognized index entries means
this file isn't functioning as an index, not that the log has drifted.

See also the process write-up at https://example.invalid/how-to-write-an-adr for
background reading, referenced here in prose rather than as an index row.
